title: Anchored Spec — Workflow Policy
description: Governance rules: workflow variants, path-based enforcement, trivial exemptions, and lifecycle gates.

defaultTypes.description: Change types that default to this variant

artifacts.description: Ordered list of artifacts this variant requires (e.g., 'requirements', 'design-doc', 'implementation-plan')

skipSkillSequence.description: If true, skip mandatory skill/ceremony sequence

verificationFocus.description: What to verify for this variant

include.description: Glob patterns — files matching these require a change record

exclude.description: Glob patterns — files matching these are excluded from this rule

requiredDocs.description: Documents that must exist for changes matching this rule

commands.description: Commands to run for changes matching this rule

changeRequiredRules.description: Path-based rules that mandate change records

trivialExemptions.description: Glob patterns for paths that never require a change record

conditions.description: All conditions must be true for chore eligibility

escalationRule.description: What happens when conditions are not met

choreEligibility.description: When a change qualifies as a chore (lightweight workflow)

plannedToActiveRequiresChange.description: REQ can't go active without a CHG

activeToShippedRequiresCoverage.description: REQ can't ship without test evidence

deprecatedRequiresReason.description: REQ can't be deprecated without a reason or replacement
